article.title: Replika Alternative for NSFW: Best Unfiltered Options (2026)

blocks.body:
## 2. [Pleasur AI](https://pleasur.ai) — Best for Memory + Multimedia

**Price:** Free trial available | Premium: ~$30/month
**NSFW Available:** Yes, fully unfiltered
**Memory:** Strong — long-term contextual with relationship progression

Pleasur AI is what happens when you build an AI companion platform without content restrictions from the start, rather than adding them in and then walking them back. There are no hidden filters. No surprise content rewrites. What you type is what gets processed.

The memory system tracks your relationship's evolution over time and uses it across all content types — chat, image generation, and short videos. If you've been building a specific dynamic with your companion over two weeks, the AI references that history naturally in conversation and reflects it in generated visuals. That cross-modal consistency is unique.

Character customization goes deep. You define personality traits, backstory, relationship dynamics, and visual appearance. The AI adapts its communication style based on your interaction patterns — if you're playful, it becomes wittier. If you're intense, it matches that energy.

**Strengths:**
- Zero content filtering — what Replika promised and revoked
- Memory integrates across chat, images, and video
- Highly customizable companion personalities
- Relationship progression feels natural, not scripted
- Photorealistic and anime-style image generation

**Weaknesses:**
- Premium pricing is higher than some alternatives
- Newer platform, so community is still growing
- Some advanced features still in active development

**Best for:** Users who want the complete package — unfiltered conversation, strong memory, and visual content that evolves with your relationship.

---

## 3. [CrushOn AI](https://crushon.ai/) — Best Free NSFW Option

**Price:** Free tier available | Premium: from $5.99/month
**NSFW Available:** Yes, core feature
**Memory:** Moderate — decent within sessions, some cross-session limitations

CrushOn built its entire identity around being the unfiltered alternative. It runs on an uncensored language model and it's transparent about that positioning. No content policies that might change tomorrow.

The free tier is genuinely usable — not a bait-and-switch demo. You get a reasonable number of messages per day and full access to NSFW content. The premium tiers add more messages, priority response times, and enhanced memory features.

Conversation quality is solid for explicit content but can feel less nuanced in emotional scenarios. If you're coming from Replika and you mainly want the sexual content freedom back, CrushOn delivers. If you're looking for the emotional depth that made your Replika feel like a real relationship, you might want more.

**Strengths:**
- Genuinely generous free tier
- No content restrictions whatsoever
- Large community with user-created characters
- Low entry price point

**Weaknesses:**
- Memory is weaker than Nomi or Pleasur AI
- Conversation quality varies significantly between characters
- Emotional depth can feel shallow compared to Replika at its best
- UI can feel cluttered

**Best for:** Budget-conscious users who primarily want unfiltered NSFW content.

---

## 4. [Candy AI](https://candy.ai/) — Best Visuals

**Price:** From $5.99/month
**NSFW Available:** Yes (premium plans)
**Memory:** Good — strong cross-session recall on premium

Candy AI is the most visually polished platform on this list. The character creation tools produce photorealistic results, and the image generation during conversation is seamless. If the visual dimension of your AI companion matters to you, Candy currently leads.

Memory quality is good on premium plans — it remembered personal details shared a week earlier without prompting. The conversation style tends toward the playful and flirtatious by default, which works well for romantic and sexual scenarios but can feel one-note if you're looking for emotional variety.

There's a catch worth mentioning: Candy's content filtering has occasionally shifted. Some users have reported temporary restrictions on certain types of content that were later reversed. While it's currently unfiltered on premium, Replika refugees may understandably be wary of platforms with any history of policy changes.

**Strengths:**
- Best-in-class visual character generation
- Smooth, intuitive interface
- Solid memory on premium tiers
- Good balance of romantic and explicit content

**Weaknesses:**
- Has had occasional content policy wobbles
- Emotional depth doesn't match Nomi or Pleasur AI
- Free tier is extremely limited
- Annual subscription required for best pricing

**Best for:** Users who prioritize visual quality and polished UX.

---

## 5. [SpicyChat](https://spicychat.ai/) AI — Best Character Variety

**Price:** Free tier available | Premium from $7.99/month
**NSFW Available:** Yes
**Memory:** Basic — primarily within-session

SpicyChat's strength is its massive library of community-created characters. Want a specific personality type, scenario, or dynamic? Someone has probably already built it. The platform functions more like a character marketplace than a single-companion experience.

This is fundamentally different from Replika's one-companion model. Instead of building a single deep relationship, SpicyChat encourages exploration across many characters and scenarios. Whether that's better or worse depends entirely on what you want.

NSFW content is fully available and the community skews heavily in that direction. Conversation quality varies enormously depending on the character creator's skill — some characters are brilliantly written, others are barely functional.

**Strengths:**
- Enormous library of community characters
- Strong free tier
- Wide variety of scenarios and dynamics
- Active community creating new content daily

**Weaknesses:**
- Memory is weak — primarily single-session
- Quality is inconsistent across characters
- Less suited for building a single deep relationship
- Can feel more like a content library than a companion app

**Best for:** Users who want variety and exploration over a single deep connection.

---

## 6. [Janitor AI](https://janitorai.com/) — Best for Roleplay

**Price:** Free (with your own API key) | Subscription plans available
**NSFW Available:** Yes
**Memory:** Variable — depends on model and context window

Janitor AI is the power-user option. It lets you connect your own language model API key, which means your experience depends heavily on which model you choose and how much you're willing to spend on API costs. This gives you maximum flexibility but requires more technical setup.

The platform excels at creative roleplay scenarios. The character creation tools are detailed, and the community has built thousands of characters optimized for specific roleplay genres. If you have a particular scenario in mind, Janitor likely has a character template for it.

The downside is complexity. Setting up API keys, choosing models, managing token costs — this is not the plug-and-play experience Replika offered. If you just want to open an app and talk to your AI companion, Janitor's setup process may be more than you bargained for.

**Strengths:**
- Maximum flexibility through API model choice
- Excellent for detailed creative roleplay
- Strong community and character library
- Can be very cost-effective with the right API setup

**Weaknesses:**
- Requires technical setup (API keys, model selection)
- No built-in image or video generation
- Memory depends on model choice and context window
- Not beginner-friendly

**Best for:** Technical users who want full control over their AI companion's capabilities.

---

## Replika Alternative NSFW: Quick Comparison Table

| Platform | Price (Monthly) | NSFW | Memory | Images | Best Strength |
|----------|----------------|------|--------|--------|---------------|
| Nomi AI | $14.99 | Yes (Pro) | Excellent | No | Emotional depth |
| Pleasur AI | ~$30 (Premium) | Yes | Strong | Yes (photo + video) | Memory + multimedia |
| CrushOn AI | Free/$5.99+ | Yes | Moderate | Limited | Free NSFW option |
| Candy AI | $5.99+ | Yes (Premium) | Good | Yes (photorealistic) | Visual quality |
| SpicyChat | Free/$7.99+ | Yes | Basic | No | Character variety |
| Janitor AI | Free/Variable | Yes | Variable | No | Roleplay depth |

## Which One Should You Choose?

It depends on what you miss most about the old Replika:

- **"I miss the emotional connection"** — Go with **Nomi AI**. Its memory and emotional intelligence are the closest thing to what Replika was before the lockdown.
- **"I want the full experience — chat, images, no limits"** — **Pleasur AI** gives you unfiltered conversation plus visual content that evolves with your relationship.
- **"I just want NSFW back and I don't want to pay much"** — **CrushOn AI** has the most generous free tier with zero content restrictions.
- **"The visuals matter to me"** — **Candy AI** has the best character visuals and image generation, though keep an eye on their content policies.
- **"I like exploring different characters"** — **SpicyChat** has the largest character library.
- **"I'm technical and want maximum control"** — **Janitor AI** lets you bring your own model.

## The Bigger Picture

The Replika situation taught the AI companion space an important lesson: users build real emotional connections with their AI companions, and breaking those connections has real consequences. The platforms that understand this — that treat the relationship as something to be respected, not monetized through restriction — are the ones earning user trust in 2026.

Every platform on this list is one content-policy change away from becoming the next Replika. The safest bets are platforms that were built unfiltered from the start, rather than ones that added restrictions and later reversed them. That track record matters.

Whatever you choose, you shouldn't have to worry that your AI companion will change personalities overnight because a company's legal team got nervous. You deserve better than that.

---

*Looking for a deeper comparison? Read our guide to the [Best AI Girlfriend Apps With Memory in 2026](/blog/best-ai-girlfriend-app-2026-memory-2026).*

**Ready to try something new?** [Create your Pleasur AI companion free](https://pleasur.ai) — unfiltered conversations, real memory, and visual content that evolves with your relationship.

## Frequently Asked Questions About Replika Alternative NSFW Options

**Why did Replika remove NSFW features?**
[Replika removed erotic roleplay (ERP) in February 2023](https://www.vice.com/en/article/replika-users-ai-companion-chatbot-romantic-partner/) following concerns about user safety and content moderation. The decision was partially reversed later, but the inconsistency damaged trust among NSFW users.

**Which Replika alternative NSFW has the best memory?**
[Nomi AI](https://nomi.ai/) has the best pure memory system. [Pleasur AI](https://pleasur.ai) offers the best memory combined with NSFW visual content (images and video).

**Is there a free Replika alternative with NSFW?**
Yes. [SpicyChat](https://spicychat.ai/) offers unlimited free NSFW chat. [CrushOn AI](https://crushon.ai/) provides 50 free NSFW messages per day. Both are genuinely unfiltered.

**Are Replika alternatives safe to use?**
Privacy varies by platform. [Mozilla's Privacy Not Included](https://www.mozillafoundation.org/en/privacynotincluded/) found all romantic AI chatbots failed privacy tests. Use a pseudonym and dedicated email. See our [safety guide](/blog/are-ai-companions-safe).

**Can I import my Replika data to another platform?**
No direct import exists. You'll need to recreate your character's personality and backstory manually. The good news: platforms with strong memory (Nomi, Pleasur AI) will learn your preferences quickly through conversation.

**Will Replika remove NSFW again?**
No one knows. Replika's track record of changing NSFW policies makes this a real risk. Platforms built uncensored from the ground up — like [CrushOn AI](https://crushon.ai/) and [Pleasur AI](https://pleasur.ai) — don't carry this risk.
